rows.description: Computus Geo. Paynter Rec. soris a secundo die Novembr. 1708 ad eundem diem 1709.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the description text ('Geo. Paynter Rec. soris' and 'Novembr.'). Both agree on row type and no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of 'remanentiis'. Both agree on row type and no amounts.

Description 'In Cista' from gemini-flash is correct. Pounds (44) and shillings (17) are clear and agreed. Pence is clearly '1', and the trailing 'd' symbol is interpreted as a 0.5 (half-penny) fraction, per the special rule regarding 'd' after pence digit. claude-haiku misread description and pence value ('10').
Selected gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of 'Arreragys'. Both agree on row type and no amounts.
Consensus across all extractors for description, type, and amounts.

Selected gemini-flash's description 'Longwiteham' as more accurate. Amounts for pounds (59) and shillings (19) are agreed. Pence is '9' with a clear 'd ob' symbol, which correctly interprets as a 0.5 (half-penny) fraction based on the special rule. claude-haiku missed the fraction.
Selected gemini-flash's description 'min hennet in pt' as more accurate. Amounts are agreed and clear. claude-haiku had minor transcription differences in description.
Selected gemini-flash's description 'South newington - & anno' as more accurate, preserving the dash. Amounts are agreed and clear.
Selected gemini-flash's description 'Cudlington Rry pro mich' as more accurate, showing 'Rry' instead of 'Ry'. Amounts are agreed and clear.

Selected gemini-flash for more accurate description ('Rry' instead of 'Ry') and correct column alignment of amounts. Amounts are clearly 3 pounds, 8 shillings, 0 pence in the image. claude-haiku misaligned shillings and pence.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Chacell Hill & sesquinno'. Changed row_type to 'header' as it has no amounts and functions as a section label for subsequent entries, aligning with protocol definition. claude-haiku misread the description.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Thrup'. Changed row_type to 'header' as it has no amounts and functions as a section label, aligning with protocol definition. claude-haiku misread description as 'Thropp'.

Selected gemini-flash. Its description 'Ralph marshalls capons' is accurate (no apostrophe). Amounts (0 pounds, 2 shillings, 6 pence) are clearly visible in the image. claude-haiku completely missed the amounts and incorrectly classified as a header.

Selected gemini-flash. Description is agreed. Amounts are clearly 4 pounds, 5 shillings, 3 pence with a 0.5 (half-penny) fraction ('d ob' symbol) in the image. claude-haiku misread all numeric values.

Selected gemini-flash. Its description 'Calcott pro anno' is accurate. Amounts are clearly 3 pounds, 3 shillings, 3 pence with a 0.75 (three farthings) fraction ('d q' symbol) in the image. claude-haiku misread description, all numeric values, and the fraction symbol.

Selected gemini-flash. Its description 'Cudlington mills & mich' is accurate. Amounts are clearly 0 pounds, 12 shillings, 3 pence with a 0.5 (half-penny) fraction ('d ob' symbol) in the image. claude-haiku misread description and numeric values.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Bampton & biennio'. Visually verified that there are NO amounts for this line in the image, despite claude-haiku inventing them. Changed row_type to 'header' as it functions as a descriptive label without associated monetary values.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Mountague & quinguienio et dimid.', which is closer to the original script (correct Latin, no extra '&', lower-case 'd'). Changed row_type to 'header' as it functions as a descriptive label without associated monetary values. Both agreed on no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Hughes & Biennio'. Changed row_type to 'header' as it functions as a descriptive label without associated monetary values. Both agreed on no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Greeneway & Triennio'. Changed row_type to 'header' as it functions as a descriptive label without associated monetary values. Both agreed on no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash's assertion that there are no amounts for this line, which is visually confirmed by dashes in the amount columns. claude-haiku incorrectly extracted all zeros. Changed row_type to 'header' as it functions as a descriptive label without associated monetary values.
Consensus across all extractors for description, type, and amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Minne & Biennio' and correct amount alignment. Amounts are clearly 1 pound, 0 shillings, 0 pence. claude-haiku misread description and misaligned amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Molineux & anno'. Visually confirmed no amounts for this line (dashes present). claude-haiku misread description and incorrectly extracted all zeros. Changed row_type to 'header'.

Selected gemini-flash's assertion that there are no amounts for this line, which is visually confirmed by dashes in the amount columns. claude-haiku incorrectly extracted amounts, which led to a hard rule violation (pence 18) and low confidence.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed 'Tintinhull' is a distinct header line with no amounts. claude-haiku completely misidentified this row, combining a header with a later entry, and also had a hard rule violation for pence.

Row extracted from gemini-flash. This row, 'Napper pro sesquianno' with amounts 4 pounds, 18 shillings, 7 pence and 0.75 fraction ('q' symbol), is clearly visible in the image. claude-haiku entirely missed a correct extraction of this row.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Hopkins & Sesquianno' and correct amounts. Amounts are clearly 2 pounds, 12 shillings, 1 pence with a 0.5 (half-penny) fraction ('d ob' symbol). claude-haiku misread all numeric values.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Clifton Ferry & anno' and correct amounts. Amounts are clearly 6 pounds, 7 shillings, 8 pence with a 0.75 (three farthings) fraction ('q' symbol). claude-haiku misread description, all numeric values, and had a hard rule violation for pence.

Combined descriptions: used claude-haiku's 'Bensington' (more accurate than 'Densington') and gemini-flash's 'triennio' (more accurate than 'trienno'). Amounts are taken from gemini-flash (4 pounds, 17 shillings, 2 pence, no fraction), which are visually accurate. claude-haiku misread amounts and added an incorrect fraction.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Brew house & anno' and correct amounts. Amounts are clearly 10 pounds, 1 shilling, 9 pence with a 0.75 (three farthings) fraction ('q' symbol). claude-haiku misread description, all numeric values, and the fraction.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'South newton Tenemts & anno' and correct amounts. Amounts are clearly 8 pounds, 3 shillings, 6 pence with no fraction. claude-haiku misread description and incorrectly assumed no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Fretherwin & sesqui anno'. Both agreed on no amounts. Changed row_type to 'header' as it functions as a descriptive label without associated monetary values.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'merton Vicarage & quadriennio' and correct amounts. Amounts are clearly 4 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. claude-haiku misread description and pounds amount.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Backgate Jennings' and correct amounts. Amounts are clearly 5 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. claude-haiku misread description and amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. Description is agreed. Amounts are clearly 5 pounds, 7 shillings, 2 pence with no fraction. claude-haiku misread amounts and added an incorrect fraction.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Due quitrents & anno' and correct amounts. Amounts are clearly 0 pounds, 8 shillings, 0 pence with no fraction. claude-haiku misread description and amounts.

Description selected from gemini-flash ('Warner & Biennio') for accuracy. Amounts (0 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) are clearly visible in the image and correctly extracted by claude-haiku, which gemini-flash missed (reporting no amounts). Row type is 'entry' due to presence of amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate amounts (322 pounds, 19 shillings, 9 pence, no fraction). Visually confirmed no fraction symbol after the '9'. Also, no explicit 'TOTAL' text is present in the image, so an empty description is more accurate to the raw content. claude-haiku incorrectly added a 0.5 fraction and 'TOTAL' description.
